_lockNote: mode is one of paper|shadow|live, default paper. This file alone can NEVER enable live trading: mode="live" additionally requires live.liveConfirmed=true in this file AND every var in live.requiredEnvVars present in the environment (apps/live-engine/src/config.ts enforces both, synchronously, before any venue is constructed or any network call is made). Flipping liveConfirmed to true here without the env vars present is still refused. This is a deliberate, logged, per-run opt-in — not a default anyone can drift into.
